---
title: "Software & Packages"
---

I am passionate about building tools that make spatial analysis more accessible. Below are some of the open-source projects I lead or contribute to.

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.software-card}
### `GeoFlow-Py`
A high-performance Python library for modeling hydrology in mountainous terrains using distributed computing.
[GitHub Repo](https://github.com/example/geoflow-py) | [Docs](https://example.com/geoflow-py)
:::

::: {.software-card}
### `CoastalRisk-R`
An R package for assessing coastal vulnerability using Bayesian neural networks and historical flood data.
[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org) | [GitHub](https://github.com/example/coastalrisk)
:::

::: {.software-card}
### `UrbanHeatMapper`
A web application for visualizing urban heat islands in real-time using Landsat 8 and Sentinel-2 data.
[Live Demo](https://example.com/urbanheat) | [Software Paper](publications.qmd)
:::

:::
